The '''''Grappler''''' was an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] in service to the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the Interdictor Cruiser was deployed alongside the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Emancipator|''Accuser'']] in several patrol missions through the [[Realspace/Legends|space]] around [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. On one such patrol, the two warships were tasked with intercepting ''[[Agara]]'', ''[[Fastooni]]'', ''[[Tauuni]]'', ''[[Tuana]]'', and ''[[Triuna]]'', all [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] carrying [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Bothan Spynet/Legends|spies]] who were attempting to return to the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] from the construction site of the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]].

[[File:GarnXWA3.png|thumb|left|200px|[[Olin Garn]] fires a [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] at the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] ''Grappler''.]]
The ''Grappler'' was driven off by a flight of [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold Squadron]] [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] staging from the [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']]. After her [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well]] was shut down to permit the cruiser's escape, the Bothan freighters also made the jump to [[Hyperspace/Legends|lightspeed]].

The ''Grappler'' was also an Interdictor in the service of the traitorous [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin]]. This version is unlikely to be the same ship; the naming conflict could be a result of either this or the above mentioned ''Grappler'' having been constructed after Zaarin attempted his coup. Zaarin's ''Grappler'' was destroyed by forces led by [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] during a failed attempt to trap [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] on board the [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Sceltor]]''.
